summary: Recast the opening to carry forward chapter 12's boardwalk-to-bat-lab handoff and to avoid repeating the adjacent chapter's temporal 'By ...' opening scaffold. The chapter exit already fed cleanly into chapter 14's aftermath, so no exit rewrite was needed.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin with Mina entering the bat lab from the boardwalk, preserving the immediate handoff from chapter 12.
Removed the opening's matching 'By ...' temporal construction so chapter 13 enters on a different spatial and rhythmic scaffold than the adjacent chapter opening.
